image:image.image:title: The Grisha tree — handbags hanging like fruit from a ficus inside the boutique.
image:image.image:caption: Eye-level photograph of the signature ficus tree at Grisha, with hand-made designer handbags hanging from its branches.

image:image.image:title: Grisha reception counter, with the S/S 2026 catalogue set on dark walnut.
image:image.image:caption: A warm-wood reception counter inside Grisha, a cream-bound catalogue waiting under a pool of light.

image:image.image:title: The Grisha Catalogue — S/S 2026 cover.
image:image.image:caption: Cream linen-bound hardcover catalogue, embossed in brass: Grisha, S/S 2026, Kolkata.
